'''danala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focality|focality]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focality|focality]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| danala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dænælæth|dænælæth]] || [[word:dænælæj|dænælæj]] || [[word:dænælæsh|dænælæsh]] || [[word:dænælæ|dænælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dananalath|dananalath]] || [[word:dananalaj|dananalaj]] || [[word:dananalash|dananalash]] || [[word:dananala|dananala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:danalath|danalath]] || [[word:danalaj|danalaj]] || [[word:danalash|danalash]] || [[word:danala|danala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:danaflath|danaflath]] || [[word:danaflaj|danaflaj]] || [[word:danaflash|danaflash]] || [[word:danaflaf|danaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:danalatha|danalatha]] || [[word:danalaja|danalaja]] || [[word:danalasha|danalasha]] || [[word:danalaka|danalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:danalath|danalath]] || [[word:danalaj|danalaj]] || [[word:danalash|danalash]] || [[word:danala|danala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:danalathal|danalathal]] || [[word:danalajal|danalajal]] || [[word:danalashal|danalashal]] || [[word:danalakal|danalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:danalathatha|danalathatha]] || [[word:danalajaja|danalajaja]] || [[word:danalashasha|danalashasha]] || [[word:danalaka|danalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:danalathan|danalathan]] || [[word:danalajan|danalajan]] || [[word:danalashan|danalashan]] || [[word:danalakan|danalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:danalathaoro|danalathaoro]] || [[word:danalajaoro|danalajaoro]] || [[word:danalashaoro|danalashaoro]] || [[word:danalakaoro|danalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
